rationale: The skill centers on Firebase Hosting Classic, which requires reading/writing firebase.json and .firebaserc config and a public build directory, then invoking the firebase CLI via npx to deploy or run local emulators. Network calls go to npm registry to fetch firebase-tools and to Google/Firebase APIs for auth and deploy. The emulator binds localhost:5000 for serving. No deletions are implied by the documented verbs (configure, deploy, emulate).
